goal: Recover the latest still-recoverable 争鸣史 / Story Mode related local work from dangling Git objects and preserved local snapshots, while protecting the current workspace first.
constraints: Create a fresh local safety snapshot before overwriting any tracked file.
Prefer the newest recoverable Git object that clearly contains lost story-related work.
Restore only files whose recovered content is demonstrably newer or richer than the current workspace version.
Do not rewrite history or discard the current workspace without a backup.
deliverables: A fresh local safety snapshot created before recovery.
Recovered story-related files restored into the working tree.
A short report of what was restored and what still could not be recovered.
